---
title: "second"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
set.seed(42)
```

```{r}
#load the libraries
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scDblFinder)
library(openxlsx)

```

```{r}
#load the data

second.data <- Read10X(data.dir = "second_JMML_AML/filtered_feature_bc_matrix")

# Initialize the Seurat object with the raw (non-normalized data).
second <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = second.data, project = "second", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
second
```


```{r}
# Calculate the percentage of mitochondrial gene expression per cell

second[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(second, pattern = "^MT-")

head(second@meta.data, 5)
```

```{r}
#Violin plot

VlnPlot(second, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
```




```{r}
# Filterng and see the violin plot after that
second <- subset(second, subset = nFeature_RNA > 1000 & nFeature_RNA < 7500 & nCount_RNA > 2000 & nCount_RNA < 25000 & percent.mt < 10)


VlnPlot(second, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
```


```{r}
#Normilization and Identification of highly variable features (feature selection)

second <- NormalizeData(second, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)


second <- FindVariableFeatures(second, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 3000) 

top10_second <- head(VariableFeatures(second), 10)

plot1_second <- VariableFeaturePlot(second)
plot1_second <- LabelPoints(plot = plot1_second, points = top10_second, repel = TRUE)

plot1_second


```


```{r}
#Scaling the data

all.genes_second <- rownames(second)
second <- ScaleData(second, features = all.genes_second)
```

```{r}
# PCA

second <- RunPCA(second, features = VariableFeatures(object = second))

# Examine and visualize PCA results a few different ways
print(second[["pca"]], dims = 1:5, nfeatures = 5)

VizDimLoadings(second, dims = 1:2, reduction = "pca")
```

```{r}
#PCA plot

DimPlot(second, reduction = "pca") + NoLegend()
```



```{r}
#Heat map

DimHeatmap(second, dims = 1, cells = 500, balanced = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#Determine the ‘dimensionality’ of the dataset

ElbowPlot(second, ndims=50)
```


```{r}
#Cluster the cells
set.seed(42)
second <- FindNeighbors(second, dims = 1:30)
second <- FindClusters(second, resolution = 1.2)

#Look at cluster IDs of the first 5 cells
head(Idents(second), 5)
```


```{r}
#Doublets filtering

sce_second <- as.SingleCellExperiment(second)
sce_second <- scDblFinder(sce_second)


table(colData(sce_second)$scDblFinder.class)


second$doublet_call  <- colData(sce_second)$scDblFinder.class
second$doublet_score <- colData(sce_second)$scDblFinder.score

table(second$doublet_call)



```



```{r}
#Remove doublets

second_singlets <- subset(second, subset = doublet_call == "singlet")
second_singlets

```


```{r}
# Normalize data, identify variable genes, perform dimensionality reduction,
# clustering, and UMAP visualization of singlet cells for the second sample.

set.seed(42)

second_singlets <- NormalizeData(second_singlets)
second_singlets <- FindVariableFeatures(second_singlets)
second_singlets <- ScaleData(second_singlets)
second_singlets <- RunPCA(second_singlets, npcs = 30)

second_singlets <- FindNeighbors(second_singlets, dims = 1:30)
second_singlets <- FindClusters(second_singlets, resolution = 1.2)
second_singlets <- RunUMAP(second_singlets, dims = 1:30, seed.use = 42)

DimPlot(second_singlets, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()

```

```{r}
# 0 - (CD34, AVP, HLF) - HSC

# 1 - (CD14, LGALS3, S100A8, S100A9, LYZ, CD68, CST3) - IF Monocytes

# 2 - (CD34, KIT) - MPP

# 3 - (LYZ, CD68, C1QA, C1QB, C1QC, CST3) - Macrophages

# 4 - (CD14, LGALS3, S100A8, S100A9, LYZ, CD68, CST3) - Monocytes

# 5 - (CD1C, LYZ, CD68, CST3) - Monocyte/DC-like

# 6 - (PPBP,PF4) - Megakaryocytes	

# 7 - (CD34, KIT) - MPP

# 8 - (CPA3, CD34, GATA2, IKZF2) - Mast Progenitors 

# 9 - (MKI67, CD34, MPO, AZU1) - Granulocytic Progenitors

# 10* - (PPBP,PF4) - Megakaryocyte	

# 11* - (LTB, TRAC, CD3D, CD3E, IL7R, CCR7) - CD4 T cell

# 12 - (LTB, TRAC, CD3D, CD3E, CD8B, CD8A, IL7R, CCR7) - CD8 T cells

# 13 - (LTB, TRAC, CD3D, CD3E, CTLA4, IL7R, CCR7) - Activated T cells

# 14 - (CD79A, MS4A1, CD19, PAX5, CCR7) - B cells

# 15 - (LILRA4) - pDC

# 16 - (GNLY, PRF1, NKG7, CD3D, CD3E, CD8B, CD8A, IL7R) - Cytotoxic CD8

# 17 - (CPA3, TPSAB1, GATA2, IKZF2) - mast cell

# 18 - (CD34, AVP) - HSC

# 19 - (CD34, HLF) - HSC

# 20 - (MZB1) - Plasmic cells
```

```{r}
# Try to identify clusters
DotPlot(second_singlets, features = c("CD41","PPBP","PF4"))
```



```{r}
# find markers for every cluster compared to all remaining cells, report only the positive ones
second_singlets.markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  second_singlets,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.05
) #cutoff for min % of cells in which genes are expressed

second_markers_top20 <- second_singlets.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = avg_log2FC, n = 20) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))


second_markers_strict <- second_singlets.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 1) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))

```


```{r}
# Create an Excel workbook and export marker gene tables for downstream inspection and reporting
wb_second <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb_second, "Top20_markers")
writeData(wb_second, "Top20_markers", second_markers_top20)

addWorksheet(wb_second, "Strict_markers_logFC_gt1")
writeData(wb_second, "Strict_markers_logFC_gt1", second_markers_strict)

saveWorkbook(
  wb_second,
  file = "JMML_cluster_markers_second_singlets_dims30_res1.2_seed42.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)

```


```{r}
# Map Seurat clusters to biological cell type labels for the second sample and visualize the final annotated UMAP.

cluster2celltype_second <- c(
  "0"  = "HSC",
  "1"  = "IF Monocytes",
  "2"  = "MPP",
  "3"  = "Macrophages",
  "4"  = "Monocytes",
  "5"  = "Monocyte/DC-like",
  "6"  = "Megakaryocytes",
  "7"  = "MPP",
  "8"  = "Mast Progenitors",
  "9"  = "Granulocytic Progenitors",
  "10" = "Megakaryocytes",
  "11" = "CD4 T Cells",
  "12" = "CD8 T Cells",
  "13" = "Activated T Cells",
  "14" = "B Cells",
  "15" = "pDC",
  "16" = "Cytotoxic CD8 T Cells",
  "17" = "Mast Cells",
  "18" = "HSC",
  "19" = "HSC",
  "20" = "Plasma Cells"
)

second_singlets$celltype <- unname(
  cluster2celltype_second[as.character(second_singlets$seurat_clusters)]
)

Idents(second_singlets) <- "celltype"

DimPlot(second_singlets, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) + NoLegend()

```



```{r}

# Export the second Seurat object to .h5ad format (SingleCellExperiment) for Python/CellTypist,
# ensuring both log-normalized expression (logcounts) and raw counts layers are present.

library(zellkonverter)

sce_ <- as.SingleCellExperiment(second_singlets)

if (!"logcounts" %in% SummarizedExperiment::assayNames(sce_)) {
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(sce_, "logcounts") <- 
    GetAssayData(second_singlets, layer = "data")
}

SummarizedExperiment::assay(sce_, "counts") <- 
  GetAssayData(second_singlets, layer = "counts")

writeH5AD(
  sce_,
  "second_singlets_log1p10k.h5ad",
  X_name = "logcounts"
)

```



```{r}
# Load CellTypist prediction output and inspect the table structure.

library(readr)

pred <- read_csv("second_JMML_AML/predicted_labels.csv")

head(pred)
colnames(pred)



```

```{r}
# Map CellTypist majority-voting labels to Seurat cell barcodes, add predictions to metadata, and visualize the annotation on UMAP.

mv <- pred$majority_voting
names(mv) <- pred$...1

second_singlets$celltypist <- mv[Cells(second_singlets)]

DimPlot(second_singlets, group.by = "celltypist", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()

```
